0: A wide-angle shot of an aged traditional Chinese study-bedroom, with cracked plaster walls, tall wooden windows, hanging paper scrolls, an old wall map, dark wooden cabinets, and a simple bed covered with folded bedding. Soft daylight filters through the windows, illuminating a worn wooden writing desk with books, a desk lamp, and a wicker chair. The camera slowly turns to the right while gradually pulling backward for the first five seconds, keeping the old room coherent as the visible furniture and wall details shift gently across the frame. The scene has a quiet, nostalgic atmosphere, with muted beige walls, warm wood tones, faded paper textures, dusty floorboards, and no modern objects.
80: A steady interior shot of the same old Chinese study-bedroom as the camera continues rotating to the right after the backward pull. The view gradually turns away from the starting wall and becomes squarely oriented toward another weathered plaster wall that was not visible in the first frame, revealing an old single wooden door, worn wooden trim, cracked corners, aged floor-wall junctions, and softened daylight spilling across the room. The original desk, books, lamp, wicker chair, cabinets, bed, tall windows, hanging paper scrolls, and old map remain part of the same continuous space, while the newly revealed wall and door become the main focus. The scene keeps its vintage, timeworn atmosphere, muted colors, soft natural lighting, and still, unoccupied interior.
